'''Paul Noone''' (born {{birth date|1981|4|22|df=y}}) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who played as a [[Goal (sport)#Rugby football|goal]]-kicking {{rlp|sr}} and {{rlp|lf}} in the 2000s and 2010s. 

== Career ==
He played at club level in the [[Super League]] for the [[Warrington Wolves]], and the [[London Broncos#2006–2011: Harlequins Rugby League|Harlequins RL]], and in the [[Championship (rugby league)|Co-operative Championship]] for the [[Widnes Vikings]] (where in 2007 he scored 5 tries in 22 games<ref name="Player Stats">{{cite web |date=2007-07-20 |title=Player Stats |url=http://www.widnesvikings.co.uk/playerstats.php |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20070621200401/http://www.widnesvikings.co.uk/playerstats.php <!-- Bot retrieved archive --> |archivedate=2007-06-21 |accessdate=2007-08-08 |publisher=Widnes}}</ref>), the [[Barrow Raiders]] and [[Oldham R.L.F.C.|Oldham]].<ref name="Profile at loverugbyleague.com" /><ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org" /> He has been noted for his ability to break a tackle, whilst his defence is also highly regarded.<ref name="Lee Doran">{{cite web |date=2007-08-08 |title=Paul Noone |url=http://www.widnesvikings.co.uk/players.php?id=21 |archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20070927201403/http://www.widnesvikings.co.uk/players.php?id=21 <!-- Bot retrieved archive --> |archivedate=2007-09-27 |accessdate=2007-08-08 |publisher=Widnes}}</ref>

== Personal life ==
Noone was born in [[Widnes]], [[Cheshire]].
